GABOR CITED BY PLTF'S COUNSEL IS DISTINGUISHABLE BOTH AS TO LEGAL DEFINITION(S) OF THE RESPEC TIVE RENT CONTROL ORDINANCE & THE FACTS & IS NOT BINDING.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR, DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS GRANTED IN L&M

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT COPELAND, ROBERT SCHLAFLY, CATHERINE ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $1,043.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,043.00, DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. COURT FINDS AS A MATTER OF LAW THAT THE PREMISES IS A "RESIDENTIAL DWELLING UNIT" SUBJECT TO THE S.F. RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILI- ZATION & ARBITRATION ORDINANCE, SF ADMIN.CODE CHAP. 37.9(A). SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
